SELECT num, formatReadableQuantity(num) AS readable FROM test_numbers;
SELECT arrayJoin([0, 999, 1000, 1024, 1200, 1000000, 123456789, 98765432101234]) AS number, formatReadableQuantity(number) AS number_for_humans;
SELECT a.num, formatReadableQuantity(b.num) AS readable FROM (SELECT num FROM test_numbers) AS a JOIN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers) AS b ON a.num < b.num;
SELECT formatReadableQuantity(SUM(num)) AS total_readable FROM test_numbers;
SELECT formatReadableQuantity(AVG(num)) AS average_readable FROM test_numbers;
WITH (SELECT SUM(num) FROM test_numbers) AS total FROM test_numbers WHERE total > 1000;
SELECT formatReadableQuantity(num) AS readable FROM (SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num IS NOT NULL) WHERE num > 1000;
SELECT formatReadableQuantity(CAST(num AS Float32)) AS formatted FROM (SELECT num FROM test_numbers LIMIT 5) ORDER BY num DESC;
